hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.dev.vars|*.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit secret files (.dev.vars, .env). Use wrangler secret put or .dev.vars.example instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx) pnpm biome format --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
